The '''Peace Vote''', also known as the '''Appeasement Vote''' by its detractors, was proposed by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. It would have outlawed the [[New Jedi Order]], allowing the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to retain their current holdings in accordance to the peace proposed by the invaders after [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|the fall of Duro]].

==Description==
Senator Shesh, acting as a Yuuzhan Vong double agent, lead the support for the Peace Bill; however, actions taken by her office against the [[Solo family/Legends|Solos]] led to her public disgrace and helped to win discredit for the cause. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] brought to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Corruption Panel]] attention to links between the traitorous [[CorDuro Shipping]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] paid to assassinate the Solo couple.

The bill was voted down by the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] two to one, but marked the increase in [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|anti-Jedi sentiment]]. Had it been passed, it would have been the first time the Republic (both Old and New) would have yielded to outside aggression and would have in reality achieved nothing due to a subtle nuance of the [[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|Yuuzhan Vong]]. In Yuuzhan Vong, peace meant submission.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' {{1st}}
